text: I tried to make a payment, but it says my card isn't recognized. What’s happening?

I tried to add funds to my account, but the system said the top-up was unsuccessful. However, my bank notified me that the amount was deducted. I’m really confused about what's going on here and would appreciate some clarity on this issue.
I am writing to report that my card was swallowed by the ATM during a transaction. It did not return it, and I was unable to complete my withdrawal. Can you please assist with retrieving my card?
I attempted to top up my account, but the transaction did not go through. Could you please assist me in understanding why this happened?
I see my payment is still pending. Can you check what's going on?
Hello, I noticed a fee was applied to my card payment that I wasn't expecting. Can you clarify why that fee was charged? I would appreciate any details you can provide regarding this matter.
I tried to buy groceries but my card got declined. What’s going on?
I just tried to make a payment, but my card was declined and it’s really frustrating! I need this sorted out as soon as possible, please.

I recently used my card for a purchase while traveling abroad, and I noticed the exchange rate was not what I expected—it seemed way off compared to what I checked online. Could you help me understand why I was charged this rate? I’ve already been over my last few transactions, and I think it might have been a mistake, but I'm not sure. Oh, by the way, I also had an issue with my internet connection during the transaction, so that might have added to the confusion.
I'm really frustrated! I tried to use my card, and it just wouldn't work at the store. What’s going on? I even checked my balance, but it seems fine. I really need it to work for my groceries.

Hi there! I ordered my new card a while back, but I still haven't received anything in the mail. I've been keeping an eye on my mailbox, and it's just empty. I even checked with my neighbor because sometimes packages get delivered to the wrong address, but no luck! I really hope it hasn’t gotten lost somewhere. Could you please help me figure out what's going on? Thanks!

I just made a payment while traveling, and I think the exchange rate was totally off. It doesn't seem right compared to what I saw online before making the transaction. Can you check if there was an error?
Hey! I really need help... my card payment hasn't gone through yet and it's been ages! I'm so anxious about this pending transaction, can you check what's up? Plz?
I can't believe I'm being charged a fee for this payment! It feels so unfair, especially since I was told there wouldn't be any extra costs involved. What’s going on?
I noticed that my card payment is still pending for a transaction made last week. Can you help me understand what's going on?
I tried to make a purchase, but my card got declined. Can you help me figure out why?
